original: Shekka is lounging about after a little bit of play with her toy. Once she’s recovered and cleaned up, she’ll be up to hang out again. Give her an hour at the most.

original: Shekka should be around your ship’s engines, but there’s a strangely musky smell coming from back there...
Shekka is hanging out around your ship’s engines, constantly calibrating one circuit or another to maximize power.
